THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUDAK, TOM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 528 VALENCIA ST. #305, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,750.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SHOULD DEFENDANT FULLY AND TIMELY VACATE THE PREMISES OF ALL OCCUPANTS AND PERSONAL BELONGINGS AND TURN OVER ALL KEYS ON OR BEFORE 9:00 A.M, 12/27/99, JUDGMENT SHALL BE DEEMED SATISFIED AND DEFENDANT SHALL OWN NO RENTS AND PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY $200.00 TO DEFENDANT.
